scope: Annotations for both jobs in the immutable v0.5.0 publication run

annotations.message: Node.js 20 is deprecated. The following actions target Node.js 20 but are being forced to run on Node.js 24: actions/upload-artifact@v4. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/

Node.js 20 is deprecated. The following actions target Node.js 20 but are being forced to run on Node.js 24: actions/download-artifact@v5. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
